changes.reason: The global -527 MAE tail is specifically a charm_pin_pullback_long trade entered at ES-VWAP distance 26.20 while the profile median ES-VWAP distance is 29.42. Tightening the profile-local dynamic VWAP ceiling from 30 to 25 tests whether the worst high-extension charm-pin tail can be excluded without touching pullback_long, squeeze_long, or 1DTE fallback edges.

Keep the same logical family and make the dynamic ceiling less permissive in low expected-move contexts. The worst tail had dynamicMaxVwapDistance 17.83 yet actual ES-VWAP distance 26.20, so reducing the expected-move fraction from 0.25 to 0.20 should narrow high-extension charm-pin acceptance without a broad global VWAP veto.

The worst charm-pin tail had pullback-from-high 9.75 and delayed profit, while protected extended-VWAP winners have median pullback nearer 4.0. Raising the profile-local recent-high rejection pullback threshold from 6 to 8 focuses on the high-extension rejection state instead of using a destructive setup-quality floor.

expected_effect: Should reduce charm_pin_pullback_long tail heat and possibly remove the -527 high-extension/rejection entry while preserving most fast charm-pin winners. The tradeoff is lower charm-pin throughput and possible loss of some profitable high-extension recoveries; reject if total PnL falls below 98% of run_001, charm-pin PnL retention falls below 90%, or completed trades drop more than 5-10%.
label: charm-pin-dynamic-vwap-tail-trim
rationale: Use one underexplored, profile-specific upstream-entry family rather than repeating the duplicate charm-pin tail-risk veto box or saturated take-profit work. The latest run has strong realized PnL but hidden heat: charm_pin_pullback_long contributes $1474.1 over 38 trades with median hold 5.3 minutes, yet owns the global -527 MAE. The worst row is a narrow high-extension charm-pin rejection pattern with ES-VWAP 26.20, pullback-from-high 9.75, negative VWAP acceleration, weak RSI/ADX warnings, and no early progress. Broad filters are unsafe because protected extended-VWAP winners remain valuable, so this tests only the charm-pin dynamic VWAP/recent-high-rejection admission box.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: The analyzer shows the worst charm-pin tail had no positive progress before MAE and first +1.5 points only after 80 minutes, while protected extended-VWAP winners often resolve quickly. Current config can only approximate this at entry with dynamic VWAP and recent-high rejection gates.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
strategy_hypotheses.risk: A config-only proxy can still block clean high-extension winners; a path-aware classifier must be validated against protected fast winners before promotion.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension/recent-high-rejection entries that fail to make early positive progress after entry.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE from -527 toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL and >=95% protected fast-winner count.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: Strong long-only momentum/pullback tape with unusually clean realized exits: 111 trades, $6979.1 PnL, 100% realized win rate, 0.4% drawdown, zero slow >=12h trades. Risk is hidd...
